name: io.github.ExpertVagabond/hedera-mcp
description: Build-only Hedera (Hashgraph) MCP — 51 tools across Account, HTS, HCS, EVM, File & Schedule.

environmentVariables.name: HEDERA_OPERATOR_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional default payer/treasury account id (not a private key)

environmentVariables.name: HEDERA_MIRROR_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional Mirror Node REST base URL override
